summary: Iteration 257: Backend testing of two Zoho WorkDrive bug fixes. All 13 tests passed. (1) platform_super_admin is now in the is_admin tuple check in all 3 document endpoints (list, upload, download) in documents.py. (2) workdrive_service.py upload_file correctly uses DATACENTER_UPLOAD_DOMAINS[dc] + '/api/v1/upload' with 'content' and 'parent_id' form fields.
critical_code_review_comments: documents.py: All 3 is_admin tuples include platform_super_admin correctly: ('admin', 'platform_admin', 'platform_super_admin', 'partner_admin', 'partner_super_admin', 'partner_staff') ✅
workdrive_service.py: upload_file uses DATACENTER_UPLOAD_DOMAINS (workdrive.zoho.com/api/v1/upload) not the old /workdrive/api/v1/files/{folder_id}/files path ✅
workdrive_service.py: upload_file sends multipart with 'content' (file bytes) and 'parent_id' (folder_id) form fields as required by Zoho WorkDrive API ✅
workdrive_service.py: DATACENTER_UPLOAD_DOMAINS defined at line 39 with all 6 datacenters (US/EU/AU/IN/JP/CA) ✅
documents.py: upload_document correctly derives tenant_id from customer record for platform_super_admin (is_platform_admin check at line 153) ✅
seed_data_creation: None — no test data created or left in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both Zoho WorkDrive bugs are fixed and verified: (1) platform_super_admin GET /api/documents returns 200 with documents list (not 'Customer record not found'); (2) platform_super_admin POST /api/documents/upload without customer_id returns 400 'customer_id is required for admin uploads' (not 'Customer record not found'); (3) upload with customer_id proceeds to WorkDrive path returning 400 'WorkDrive not connected' (expected in dev env with no real credentials); (4) workdrive_service.py upload_file uses workdrive.zoho.com/api/v1/upload with 'content'+'parent_id' fields. All 13 backend tests pass.

verified_scenarios.platform_super_admin_list_docs_200: PASS - GET /api/documents returns 200 with documents list
verified_scenarios.platform_super_admin_upload_no_customer_: PASS - returns 400 'customer_id is required for admin uploads'
verified_scenarios.platform_super_admin_upload_with_custome: PASS - reaches WorkDrive path (returns 400 'WorkDrive not connected')
verified_scenarios.download_nonexistent_404: PASS - platform_super_admin gets 404 'Document not found' for missing doc
verified_scenarios.is_admin_check_all_3_endpoints: PASS - platform_super_admin in is_admin tuple 3 times (list/upload/download)
